results.title: BBC comedy legend announces heartbreaking 'incurable' cancer diagnosis
results.description: The comedian announced that he has cancer for a second time.

results.title: Princess Andre fans can 'see where she got her name' as she poses in beautiful outfit
results.description: Princess Andre has left fans gobsmacked as she posed in a sequin two piece, including a corset and a long skirt, with some saying they can see where she got her name

results.title: The Madison’s Kurt Russell on Why ‘Silent Majority’ Loves Taylor Sheridan Shows
results.description: Kurt Russell recently shared his thoughts on Taylor Sheridan’s television universe. The actor, who plays Preston Clyburn in The Madison, explained why Sheridan’s shows continue to connect with so many fans. He believes the series resonates strongly with what he called the “silent majority.” Kurt Russell on the audience appeal of Taylor Sheridan’s TV universe [...] The post The Madison’s Kurt Russell on Why ‘Silent Majority’ Loves Taylor Sheridan Shows appeared first on Mandatory .

results.title: Taunton Boys & Girls Club will transform old performing arts center
results.description: Boys & Girls Clubs of Metro South plans to transform the old District Center for the Arts into a childcare center with bank funding to serve more kids.
